hero.role_line: Independent web developer · Paris — France & worldwide
hero.description: I design and build custom websites and applications for independents, brands and entrepreneurs who want an online presence that inspires trust — and turns their visitors into clients.
hero.photo_alt: Minhaj Zubair — Independent web developer based in Paris

manifesto.label: The promise
manifesto.text: A beautiful website is not enough. A fast website is not enough. I craft web experiences that make people trust your brand — and turn your visitors into clients.

work.label: Selected work
work.heading: Concrete, real-world work.
work.intro: Three real projects showing the context, execution quality and choices made for each business.
work.home_cta_text: The Work page brings together the other projects, context details and technical choices. Here, the goal is simply to make you want to go further.
work.page_intro: Websites, web and mobile applications — custom-built, from the first conversation to launch.
work.github_subtitle: More projects and source code are on GitHub.
work.closing_line: Your project could be the next one.
work.epilogue_note: What if you're looking at it right now?

labels.cta_title: Have a similar project in mind?
labels.cta_text: Tell me about your business — I'll tell you exactly what a website can do for it.

photographe.context: A photographer needed a portfolio worthy of her work: a gallery that showcases the images, a strong identity and a simple contact flow to turn visitors into bookings.
photographe.approach: A clean art direction that gives the photos all the space, an immersive responsive gallery, soft animations and calls to action present at every step — without ever stealing the show from the images.

toiture_artisan.context: A roofing craftsman wanted a website that inspires trust from the first second and generates quote requests, in a market where competitors are often invisible or outdated online.
toiture_artisan.approach: A structure entirely built for conversion: trust signals up front, services explained simply, quote requests reachable from every section and local search optimization.

luxa.context: Luxa was born from a personal observation: budgeting apps are often complex and discouraging. The goal — make money management simple, visual and part of the daily routine.
luxa.approach: A React Native mobile app with Supabase: secure authentication, real-time transaction tracking, customizable savings pockets and clear statistics. An interface designed to be opened every day.

unityvert.context: A landscape gardener wanted to grow his business with a real online presence: present his services, build trust and make getting in touch easy.
unityvert.approach: A warm, understated showcase website, well-structured services, Sanity-powered content so he stays autonomous, and a direct contact form. Launched on his own domain.

mets_merveilles.context: Mets & Merveilles is a recipe and menu management platform: create recipes, organize them by category and find them easily.
mets_merveilles.approach: A full-stack application: Next.js front end, Spring Boot API, PostgreSQL database and Clerk authentication. A project covering the whole chain, from data modeling to interface.

portfolio.context: This very website: the showcase of my work had to demonstrate what I sell — polished design, controlled animations, performance and SEO.
portfolio.approach: Next.js with the App Router, GSAP and Framer Motion animations, FR/EN internationalization, complete technical SEO and careful loading optimization. The code is public on GitHub.

services.heading: Custom websites, not one-size-fits-all packages.
services.intro: Three ways to work together, depending on where your project stands.

about.heading: Behind the code, a person.
about.intro: Background, how I work, and what drives me every day.

consent.title: Analytics
consent.description: I use Google Analytics to understand how the site is used and improve it. No data is used for advertising purposes.

about_teaser.label: About
about_teaser.heading: A developer, not an agency.
about_teaser.p1: I'm Minhaj. Based in Paris, I design and build every project myself, from the first idea to launch. You talk directly to the person crafting your website — not to a middleman.
about_teaser.p2: My standard: fast websites, polished down to the smallest detail, built to serve your business. This portfolio is the proof.
proofs: Design and code by the same person

services.label: Services
services.heading: What I build for you
services.intro: Every project is designed from scratch — no templates, no one-size-fits-all. We define what your business needs, and I take care of the rest.

offers.situation: “I want a site that builds trust from the first visit”
offers.title: Custom website
offers.description: A fast, elegant website built to convince: your visitors understand what you do and reach out. Designed, developed and launched in a few weeks.
bullets: Custom design, true to your brand

offers.situation: “I want a tool that makes my day-to-day business simpler”
offers.title: Web application
offers.description: A client portal, a dashboard, an internal tool: a smooth interface and a solid architecture that grows with your business.

offers.situation: “I want my website to finally convert”
offers.title: Redesign, optimization & care
offers.description: Your website exists but doesn't convert, or deserves better: I rethink it, speed it up and keep it up to date so you can focus on your work.
bullets: A direct point of contact, not a ticket

process.title: We talk
process.description: A 30-minute call to understand your business and your goals. You receive a clear quote within 48 hours.

process.title: I design
process.description: A mockup true to your brand. You approve it before a single line of code is written.

process.title: I build
process.description: A fast, clean, durable website. You follow the progress — no technical jargon.

process.title: We launch
process.description: Go-live, final adjustments and handover. I stay available after launch.

beyondCode.title: What defines me
beyondCode.description: Development is only part of who I am. Here's what drives me every day, my passions and my values.

fitness.title: Sports & Fitness
fitness.description: Discipline, consistency, pushing limits. What I build at the gym, I apply to my projects.

entrepreneurship.title: Entrepreneurship
entrepreneurship.description: Passionate about creating value. Apps, real estate, financial independence - I'm building my future brick by brick.

cars.title: Cars
cars.description: Fan of beautiful machines. I love cars, their design, their sound, their history.

music.title: Music
music.description: Music follows me everywhere, no matter my mood or what I'm doing.

travel.title: Travel
travel.description: The world resets my perspective. New time zones, new cultures, new flavors — I always come back with a fresh outlook.

beyondCode.quote: I'm building the person I'm becoming as much as the projects I work on.

home_offers.label: Offers & subscriptions
home_offers.heading: Three ways to work together.
home_offers.intro: Simple monthly plans, no commitment. Let's talk and pick the one that fits you.

maintenance.title: Your website, maintained. Your customers, delivered.
maintenance.subtitle: Three ways to work together depending on where you are.
maintenance.plans_footnote: No long-term commitment: cancel anytime with 30 days' written notice. Beyond the 30 minutes of included changes, extra work is billed at €70/hour, always approved with you before invoicing.

essential.label: The foundation
essential.name: Essential
essential.positioning: Your website stays online, secure and up to date. You don't have to think about it.
included: Website hosting and domain name management
Domain renewal and SSL certificate included
Email and WhatsApp support — handled within 72 business hours
30 min of minor changes included every month

visibility.label: Local visibility
visibility.name: Visibility
visibility.positioning: All the Essential maintenance, plus a Google profile that works for you.
included: Audit and optimization of your Google Business Profile
Updates to hours, services, photos and contact details
QR code and direct link to collect Google reviews
Message templates (SMS, WhatsApp, email) to request reviews
visibility.note: Authentic reviews only: I never publish, buy or solicit fake reviews.

growth.label: The most complete
growth.name: Growth
growth.positioning: Your website, your Google profile and a managed Google Ads campaign to bring in leads.
included: Creation and ongoing management of a local Google Ads campaign
Targeting adjustments: area, schedule, bids, budget
growth.note: The advertising budget is paid directly to Google, separately from the plan — management included for up to €1,000 of monthly ad spend.

direct_contact.title: A direct point of contact
direct_contact.description: My number, not an anonymous support ticket.

no_fake_guarantee.title: No disguised marketing guarantees
no_fake_guarantee.description: I'll tell you honestly what's working and what isn't, month after month.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: My journey
about.description: Discover my professional journey and web development skills

profile.title: Who I am
profile.paragraph1: Minhaj, 25, developer based in Paris. I started coding out of curiosity, now it's my job.
profile.paragraph2: My thing: taking an idea and turning it into something real. Whether it's a mobile app, a website or an API, I like seeing the result of my work.
profile.paragraph3: When I'm not coding, I'm at the gym or learning about real estate and entrepreneurship. I like building things, whether it's a project or my life.
profile.paragraph4: Currently available for new freelance projects. Got a project in mind? Let's talk.

freelance.bullet2: Complete project management: needs analysis, architecture, development, deployment, maintenance
freelance.bullet3: Integration of secure RESTful APIs and performance optimization

openclassrooms.bullet2: RESTful API security, performance optimization, complete application creation
openclassrooms.bullet3: 6 professional projects on GitHub (integration, accessibility, React front-end, Node.js back-end)
